barRaise.topFinding: Holding steady, not improving. The one release since the last bar-raise (v0.93.1) touched no source: it committed the prior bar-raise, the canonical-audit doc, and the tile-size handler fix, plus the version bump. So every code finding from 2026-06-03 persists verbatim and the render-lane decision ranked action #1 last cycle went unactioned for another cycle. The GDD section 16 still hedges that the 3D rework is in progress with no Decisions-tab entry resolving the lane. Commit cadence looks alive while game progress is flat. The fog vision fallthrough and missing save_version stay MEDIUM because they sit in the menu-paused 2D path.
